name: SpongeBob: Reimagined
overview: What if SpongeBob SquarePants were an old-fashioned black and white cartoon? What about a chibi anime? Or what if Squidward and his Bubble Bowl marching band were DINOSAURS? Explore these alternate episode animation styles with new episodes of SpongeBob: Reimagined every month right here on the SpongeBob SquarePants Official YouTube channel!
